appraisal_events.evidence: « baron de Charlus ne se doutait pas… »; « Quelle stupeur pour baron de Charlus… »; comparaison du poisson dans son aquarium et du « pisciculteur… (à Paris, sera Mme Verdurin) »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator underscores Charlus’s blindness to how others truly speak of him and to Mme Verdurin’s latent power over him, portraying him as self-deceived and vulnerable behind a facade of ease.

appraisal_events.evidence: « baron de Charlus était momentanément devenu, pour Mme Verdurin, le fidèle des fidèles » … « elle délégua ses fonctions au fidèle des fidèles, au baron. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme Verdurin locally elevates and includes Charlus as her top favorite and entrusts him with organizing the charity rehearsal, marking high standing within the Verdurin circle despite her lingering doubts.

status_effects.explanation: He is diminished by the narrator’s depiction of his social naïveté and dependence on others’ concealed judgments and power.
He gains local inclusion and favor as the 'fidèle des fidèles' and is delegated responsibility within the Verdurin milieu.
